title: Write Circuits: Practical Optimisation Strategies with Guillaume Drevon | NoirCon 3 Devconnect 2025
description:
Circuit complexity is a key bottleneck in zero-knowledge systems.

In this talk, a Noir Software Engineer shares practical strategies for optimizing Noir programs- reducing constraints, improving proving times, and lowering costs. Learn how to use unconstrained functions and Noir’s built-in profiler to identify and apply real-world optimization opportunities.
